en_title: GTA 6 Has Turned September Into a Video Game Battle Royale
subtitle: 血战九月
opus_summary: 随着《GTA6》定档11月19日，大量原定年底发售的游戏纷纷涌入9月，形成惨烈竞争。目前已有《黎明行者之血》《金刚狼》《控制：共振》《寂静岭：小城镇》《鬼武者：剑之道》五款大作扎堆，另有《神鬼寓言》《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》等延期至2027年避其锋芒。开发商面临艰难抉择：要么在9月血海中搏杀，要么退守明年。玩家也将面临钱包和时间双重考验。

paragraphs.en: We’ve known for years that the entire games industry would give Grand Theft Auto 6 the widest berth possible, but this week’s State of Play has proven Rockstar’s behemoth as some kind of car-jacking Moses, parting the Red Sea of releases and pushing tides of competition aside. As a result, it seems like almost the entire end-of-year slate of releases has been forced into a single month. GTA 6 has turned September into a video game battle royale, and it’s potentially going to be a bigger blood bath than anything we saw in the Wolverine trailer .
paragraphs.cn: 多年来我们一直知道整个游戏行业都会对《侠盗猎车手6》敬而远之，但本周的State of Play证实了Rockstar的巨兽就像某种劫车版的摩西，劈开了游戏发行的红海，将竞争浪潮推向两边。结果，几乎整个年底的发售档期都被迫挤进了一个月里。《GTA6》把9月变成了一场游戏大逃杀，而且可能比我们在《金刚狼》预告片里看到的任何场面都更血腥。

paragraphs.en: There are now five of what I’d consider “heavy hitters” wrestling for space in September. The Blood of Dawnwalker has a head start, launching on September 3, but this massive vampire RPG only has two weeks of freedom before Marvel’s Wolverine slices its way onto the scene on September 15. The following week there’s three games in two days - Control Resonant and Silent Hill: Townfall , both landing on September 24, and Onimusha: Way of the Sword the day after.
paragraphs.cn: 目前有五款我认为的「重磅炸弹」在9月里争夺空间。《黎明行者之血》抢先一步，于9月3日发售，但这款庞大的吸血鬼RPG只有两周的自由时间，随后漫威《金刚狼》将于9月15日杀入战场。接下来一周内两天内就有三款游戏——《控制：共振》和《寂静岭：小城镇》均于9月24日发售，《鬼武者：剑之道》紧随其后于25日发售。

paragraphs.en: Arriving around these five are a number of other significant games that will be fighting for any attention they can get. Illfonic’s Halloween creeps into stores on September 8, the long-awaited Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 drop-pods in on September 17, and the Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter remake arrives the same day. The console version of Dune: Awakening carefully steps into place on September 22. And in the first couple of days of October, there’s Ubisoft’s 3D remake of Rayman Legends , a remaster of Dynasty Warriors 3, and the brand new Ace Combat 8.
paragraphs.cn: 在这五款游戏周围，还有大量其他重要游戏在争夺任何能获得的关注。Illfonic的《万圣节》于9月8日悄然上架，备受期待的《战锤40K：战争黎明4》于9月17日空降，《英雄传说：空之轨迹the 2nd》重制版同日发售。《沙丘：觉醒》的主机版于9月22日谨慎登场。而在10月初，还有育碧的《雷曼：传奇》3D重制版、《真·三国无双3》高清复刻版以及全新的《皇牌空战8》。

paragraphs.en: And that’s just the stuff we already know about. Xbox’s showcase later this week will almost certainly reveal a September or October launch for Gears of War: E-Day. Rumours all have us expecting Nintendo to throw an Ocarina of Time remake into the world later this year, and we’re still without release dates for Star Wars Zero Company and Halo: Campaign Evolved. September stands to get even busier, the competition even fiercer.
paragraphs.cn: 而这还只是我们已经知道的内容。Xbox在本周晚些时候的展示会几乎肯定会公布《战争机器：事变日》在9月或10月发售。各种传闻让我们期待任天堂今年晚些时候推出《时之笛》重制版，而《星球大战：零号连》和《光环：战役进化》的发售日期仍未公布。9月只会变得更加拥挤，竞争更加激烈。

paragraphs.en: Every single one of these games has their own dedicated fanbase, be that niche or gargantuan, and so each will sell a respectable number of copies. But this tidal wave of competitors – a slew of games that all look really good – will no doubt erode away at the potential winnings. Even the most dedicated player can’t be expected to buy into this entire buffet, and so some of the dishes are inevitably going to go cold.
paragraphs.cn: 这些游戏每一款都有自己的忠实粉丝群体，无论小众还是庞大，因此每款都能卖出可观的销量。但这股竞争浪潮——一系列看起来都很棒的游戏——无疑会侵蚀潜在的收益。即使是最忠实的玩家也不可能买下整个自助餐，因此有些菜注定会变凉。

paragraphs.en: It feels like storm clouds are brewing over Control Resonant developer Remedy, the incredibly talented Finnish studio whose visionary games never quite connect with the size of audience they deserve. FBC: Firebreak understandably cost the company – few people were looking for a merely okay live service shooter in the 2020s – but Remedy has struggled with sales even on its critically adored projects. It took over a year for Alan Wake 2 to make a profit. The company’s new CEO, former EA studio head Jean-Charles Gaudechon, has already said that Remedy’s unique approach must be “protected”, and I can only hope he can find a way to successfully weather this storm.
paragraphs.cn: 感觉《控制：共振》的开发商Remedy上空乌云密布。这家极具天赋的芬兰工作室，其富有远见的游戏从未获得应有的受众规模。《FBC：防火线》让公司付出了代价——在2020年代，很少有人想要一款仅仅还行的服务型射击游戏——但即使是备受好评的项目，Remedy在销量上也举步维艰。《心灵杀手2》花了一年多才盈利。公司新任CEO、前EA工作室负责人Jean-Charles Gaudechon已经表示，Remedy的独特方法必须得到「保护」，我只能希望他能找到成功渡过这场风暴的方法。

paragraphs.en: But while Remedy’s struggles paint Control Resonant as the most vulnerable of all September’s releases, almost none of these games are guaranteed slam dunks. Marvel’s Wolverine will likely enjoy the smoothest ride – the next chapter in Insomniac’s Marvel series, it’s already looking incredibly good, and is the exact sort of thing a great deal of PlayStation owners are locked in for. While Logan isn’t quite as popular as Peter Parker, and so probably not destined to beat Spider-Man 2’s record of the fastest-selling PlayStation Studios game in a 24-hour period , it’s nonetheless almost guaranteed to shift copies faster than a fastball special. But it’s worth remembering those reports of concern over Spider-Man 2’s spiralling budget – if Insomniac didn’t get that under control for Wolverine, it may need to sell many millions to break even. Not an ideal situation when there will be folks holding onto their cash as they wait for GTA 6.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Remedy的困境让《控制：共振》成为9月所有发售游戏中最脆弱的一款，但几乎没有任何一款游戏是稳赢的。漫威《金刚狼》可能会是最顺利的——作为Insomniac漫威系列的下一章，它看起来已经非常出色，正是大量PlayStation玩家锁定的类型。虽然Logan不像Peter Parker那么受欢迎，因此可能无法打破《蜘蛛侠2》创下的PlayStation Studios游戏24小时内最快销售纪录，但它几乎肯定能比快球特快卖得更快。但值得记住的是，那些关于《蜘蛛侠2》预算失控的担忧报道——如果Insomniac在《金刚狼》上没有控制住预算，它可能需要卖出数百万份才能收支平衡。在人们为了等《GTA6》而捂紧钱包的情况下，这可不是理想局面。

paragraphs.en: The Blood of Dawnwalker faces its own hurdles, too. This deeply ambitious RPG is helmed by the director of The Witcher 3, whose new studio Rebel Wolves includes multiple veterans of CD Projekt Red among its staff. The game looks great, but the busy period poses many threats. Will PlayStation owners want to embark on a 50-70 hour RPG when Wolverine is just around the corner? And will Geralt fans, now safe in the knowledge that there’s a brand new expansion for The Witcher 3 arriving next year , be willing to give this one a miss in exchange for some of September’s shorter offerings that can be completed before GTA arrives on the scene? Debut projects are often a make or break situation, and I really hope that being the first of the September games – arriving after what appears to be the classic long summer drought – plays in Dawnwalker’s favour.
paragraphs.cn: 《黎明行者之血》也面临着自己的障碍。这款野心勃勃的RPG由《巫师3》总监领衔，他的新工作室Rebel Wolves拥有多位CDPR老将。游戏看起来很棒，但繁忙的档期带来了诸多威胁。PlayStation玩家会在《金刚狼》即将到来之际，愿意投入一款50-70小时的RPG吗？而杰洛特粉丝们，在得知《巫师3》明年将迎来全新扩展包后，会愿意放弃这款游戏，转而选择9月那些能在《GTA6》到来前通关的较短作品吗？首秀项目往往是成败攸关的局面，我真的希望作为9月第一款游戏——在经典的漫长夏季游戏荒之后到来——能对《黎明行者之血》有利。

paragraphs.en: It may be that those who don't have Rebel Wolves’ head start on the action may re-consider their position, certainly after the likes of Summer Game Fest and the Xbox Showcase add even more dates to the pile. We’ve already seen Phantom Blade Zero abandon its September 9 launch in favour of October 29 – a date that’s perilously close to GTA 6’s D-Day of November 19, but free from the competition of a glut of third-person action games where you cut things up with blades. Developer S-Game puts the delay down to important last-minute refinements, but intentional or otherwise, stepping outside the September battle arena will likely be beneficial for this incredibly stylish action RPG.
paragraphs.cn: 那些没有Rebel Wolves抢先优势的游戏可能会重新考虑自己的位置，尤其是在夏日游戏节和Xbox展示会等活动往堆里添加更多日期之后。我们已经看到《影之刃零》放弃了9月9日的发售日，转而选择10月29日——这个日期离《GTA6》的D-Day（11月19日）非常近，但避开了大量第三人称刀剑动作游戏的竞争。开发商S-Game将延期归因于重要的最后关头打磨，但无论有意与否，走出9月的战场对这款风格独特的动作RPG来说可能是有利的。

paragraphs.en: Phantom Blade Zero’s 50-day gamble is nothing compared to some, though. The parting of this Red Sea of releases means there’s a near and far side, and we’ve already seen a couple of games that were originally destined for 2026 make a tactical backslide into next year. Playground Games’ reboot of Fable, which had been promised to release this year after being delayed out of 2025, has now repositioned itself for a February 2027 launch . Xbox’s Matt Booty provided a straightforward reason for this: "so it can have the dedicated moment it deserves". There’s no easy victory within the shadow cast by GTA 6, and so there's no shame in stepping backwards for a second time.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，《影之刃零》的50天赌博与某些游戏相比根本不算什么。这场发行红海的分裂意味着有近岸和远岸，我们已经看到几款原本定于2026年发售的游戏战术性地退到了明年。Playground Games重启的《神鬼寓言》，在从2025年延期后曾承诺今年发售，现在已重新定位到2027年2月。Xbox的Matt Booty给出了直白的理由：「这样它才能获得应有的专属时刻。」在《GTA6》的阴影下没有轻松取胜，因此第二次后退并不丢人。

paragraphs.en: Also backflipping into February 2027 is Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis , the flashy remake of Lara Croft’s original 1996 adventure. Yes, this means Crystal Dynamics’ and Flying Wild Hog’s celebration of Lara’s origins misses its intended 30th anniversary launch, but those few months could buy Tomb Raider a much stronger victory. It also potentially means that we’ll get two outings with Lara next year, as Tomb Raider Catalyst - a brand new game that will push the series’ timeline forward for the first time since 2008’s Underworld – is also due to launch in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 同样后空翻到2027年2月的还有《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》，这是对劳拉·克劳馥1996年原始冒险的华丽重制。是的，这意味着Crystal Dynamics和Flying Wild Hog对劳拉起源的庆祝错过了原定的30周年发售，但这几个月可能为《古墓丽影》买来一场更强劲的胜利。这也可能意味着我们明年将迎来两次劳拉冒险，因为《古墓丽影：催化剂》——一款自2008年《地下世界》以来首次推动系列时间线向前推进的全新游戏——也计划于2027年发售。

paragraphs.en: There are other shifts, too – The Witcher 3’s Songs of the Past expansion was originally planned to launch this year, but was pushed into 2027 “to achieve the best possible result.” While that may refer to development polish, there’s no denying that Geralt’s one last hurrah will enjoy more attention if it stays outside of GTA 6’s gravity well. And as this week continues, with Summer Games Fest, the Xbox Games Showcase, and others announcing new dates, we’ll likely see this space around GTA become increasingly defined. Few will brave arriving within weeks of the biggest game of all time. Some will try to get ahead of it, others will find safety in 2027. And as September fills up, I wouldn’t be surprised if we get a scattering of last minute dashes as developers and publishers realise that the ninth month of 2026 wasn’t quite the safe haven they thought it would be.
paragraphs.cn: 还有其他调整——《巫师3》的《旧时曲》扩展包原计划今年发售，但被推迟到2027年「以达到最佳效果」。虽然这可能指的是开发打磨，但不可否认，如果杰洛特的最后一舞远离《GTA6》的引力井，它将获得更多关注。随着本周夏日游戏节、Xbox游戏展示会等活动陆续公布新日期，我们很可能会看到《GTA》周围的这片空间变得越来越清晰。很少有人敢在史上最大游戏发售前几周内冒险。有些人会试图抢在前面，另一些人则会在2027年找到安全区。而随着9月越来越满，如果开发商和发行商意识到2026年的第九个月并不像他们想象的那样是安全港，从而出现一些最后一刻的仓促撤退，我也不会感到惊讶。

paragraphs.en: September is going to be tough, both for avid players attempting to find a way to play everything they’re interested in, and developers fighting for the sort of attention that’s basically a lifeline in this industry right now. It’s undeniably an exciting time – almost every game I've mentioned is something I want to play, and it’s clear that the games industry has so much to offer this year beyond the open world crime simulator on everyone’s wishlist. I just hope the impossible task of navigating GTA 6 doesn’t mean there’s devastating casualties along the way.
paragraphs.cn: 9月将会很艰难，无论是对于试图找到方法玩遍所有感兴趣游戏的狂热玩家，还是对于争夺注意力——这在当前行业基本上是生命线——的开发者来说。这无疑是一个激动人心的时刻——我提到的几乎每一款游戏都是我想玩的，而且很明显，除了每个人愿望清单上的开放世界犯罪模拟器之外，游戏行业今年还有如此多的内容。我只希望，在《GTA6》的导航下完成不可能的任务，并不意味着沿途会有毁灭性的伤亡。

paragraphs.en: Matt Purslow is IGN's Executive Editor of Features.
paragraphs.cn: Matt Purslow是IGN的特稿执行编辑。
